title: [v4.9] fix "concurrent map writes" in network ls compat endpoint
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #22332

/assign Luap99

```release-note
Fixed a bug in the compat network list endpoint that could crash the server with "concurrent map writes".
```

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
